name: Red Cap Squad: Zombie Source
short_description: Red Cap Squad: Zombie Source is a hardcore survival roguelike auto-shooter game. Assemble a unique team, strategically utilize traps and mechanisms, and endure the endless waves of zombies to emerge victorious!
detailed_description:
Red Cap Squad: Zombie Source is a hardcore survival roguelike game.

As a commander, recruit diverse members, build a unique elite squad, skillfully use traps and mechanisms to fend off relentless waves of zombies. Survive for 20 minutes to claim victory!

Squad Building and Formation Strategy

Start from scratch and recruit up to 10 elite soldiers to assemble your exclusive squad. Choose from 4 commanders, 16 types of soldiers, 6 formations, and 40 enhancements. Select your upgrade strategy, arrange soldier positions, and through clever tactical deployment, craft a unique combat style to face the endless tide of zombies!

Formation Micromanagement

Dynamically rotate and expand your squad's formation to maximize experience collection, optimize attack coverage, and fully utilize defensive capabilities against the relentless swarms.

Traps and Mechanisms

The battlefield is littered with traps that affect both friend and foe. The game features 4 maps, each with distinct terrain and mechanisms. You need to skillfully utilize traps and tread carefully to avoid falling victim to them yourself!

Zombie Wave Onslaught

Each zombie wave brings thousands sweeping in. Fend off uniquely threatening zombies, defeat powerful bosses, and adapt on the fly. Carve a path to survival through this endless tide of terror!
